title: 🕷 Holographic Karma Webs
name: Holographic Karma Webs
what_it_is: Karmic systems visualized as multidimensional webs—each choice entangling strands of mirrored consequence across lives.
how_to_use: her karma is encoded in holographic web—each thread a mirrored life path
he moves through choicefield—decisions light up echo-strands behind him
animation_behavior: Web pulses when touched, threads light up with decision, karma echoes ripple outward ---
